text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is well underway, and even Mejiro
Ryan has had a few chance encounters with the
possibility of romance. But...

text_block_list.name: Beachgoer A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're an Umamusume! Your ears really are
your most distinctive feature, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
U-um, no... That would be my hammies. When I
dig my heels in running, gravel gets kicked up
behind me. Cool, huh?

text_block_list.name: Beachgoer A
text_block_list.text: Your hammies? ...What's that?

text_block_list.name: Beachgoer B
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Why don't we watch the fireworks together?
Pick you up tonight, okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay. I'll see you at midnight, then. Looking
forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Beachgoer B
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that's way too late! The fireworks are
gonna be over long before that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Really?! But... isn't this the type of thing where we
promise to meet at midnight?

text_block_list.name: Beachgoer C
text_block_list.text: Let's play a game!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I think I know this one! Whoever says they
like the other first loses, right?

text_block_list.name: Beachgoer C
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a series of misunderstandings, Mejiro Ryan's
hopes go down in flames.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Uh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's completely befuddled by the total rejection
she's gotten.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Trainer... I'm just too green when it
comes to romance...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's no big deal if they just don't like me, but when
they act like I'm a weirdo...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I don't know if I'd say it's hard, It just always ends up like this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Because of McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unexpectedly, she mentions the name of her
lifelong rival. I decide to shut up and let her tell
the story.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...It's pretty pathetic, isn't it? Always competing
just to lose.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen's really pretty. And she knows how to
coordinate an outfit too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: There was a time when even I wanted to wear dresses and put ribbons in my hair.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But... I just can't measure up to her. I always lose
and get hurt...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So I gave up. If people are always gonna compare
our looks, then I'm better off not trying.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I tossed aside everything except sports. I cut my
hair short, put all my effort into workin' out...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And despite all that, she still beats me whenever
we race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's had such a painful childhood. I can't help
but to pat her on the back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it terrible? Being in the shadow of such a
talented and pretty girl like her?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I can't hold a grudge... I can't even dislike her.
You know why?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Because I really like McQueen. I've always looked
up to her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If I can't admit to myself that a good person
really is good, then I'm hopeless.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Holding out until the end, even when pushed into
a corner... Maybe that's Ryan's real strength.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You know what? It's too late. Looks like I can't
make my romantic debut.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should just devote my life to weight
lifting. Go full "no muscle, no life."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she can tackle anything in front of her,
one problem at a time, like she did to make it
into the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I encourage her and say she can indulge herself in
romance as much as she wants.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm! Then what should I do next? I need to
know!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Please teach me, Trainer! What am I lacking in the
romance department that I need to have a good
relationship?
choice_data_list: You'll need to acquire the right knowledge.

Don't say things just for the sake of saying
something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The right knowledge... Ohhh, I see. Everything
I've learned about romance is from manga.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha! I'm gonna start reading a whole lot of
other books during summer camp!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, Mejiro Ryan buries her nose in how-to
books for romance every day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Hm!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Mmm? Hmmmm?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, I never thought of doing that before! My mind muscles are blown!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Set ablaze with newfound knowledge, she turns
her bashful nature into strength!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You mean, like, be quiet and listen? So that's
what they mean by "good listener."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I'll probably end up fidgeting around until
I'm ready to burst. But I'll try it out tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I just have to hold my tongue and stay still! Then
when someone talks to me, I'll simply listen and
nod.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Come ooon... Listen good!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I gotta listen more! Listen, listen, listen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What the... How's it dark out already? Is no one
going to talk to me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her standing there so motionless, it makes
sense that no one would talk to her. But even
attempting this "exercise" shows she's got guts.
